final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing WeChat Official Account cover image for the fragrance launch "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香", centered composition with premium quality aesthetic.

Style/medium: premium editorial cover design with the quiet confidence of autumn editorial spreads, designed for WeChat article header impact
Composition: centered composition with the title as the visual anchor, generous negative space breathing around the text
Subject: 染秋 fragrance launch, the title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the dominant visual element
Scene/backdrop: abstract autumn atmosphere with subtle seasonal cues — perhaps a whisper of falling leaves or soft gradient suggesting golden hour
Lighting/mood: the warm, contemplative light of late afternoon in autumn, a gentle pause before the season turns
Color palette: warm amber and honey tones meeting cool sage and soft grey, the chromatic conversation between warmth and restraint
Materials/textures: matte paper-like surface with subtle depth, the quiet luxury of understated finishes
Text (verbatim): 染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
Constraints: title must be clearly readable at WeChat cover thumbnail size, centered weight throughout
Avoid: cluttered elements competing with the title, overly literal autumn imagery (pumpkins, maple leaves), generic stock-photo aesthetic
